sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109545" key="u(pofwti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποφωτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n109545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw light upon,</tr_> metaph., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
